overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a dystopian urban street with homeless encampments, concrete barriers, and a massive neon-lit Ferris wheel. The scene features wet pavement, scattered pedestrians, and futuristic commercial buildings with digital billboards.

events.description: pink neon glow from distant Ferris wheel becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past makeshift shelters and tents

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a mattress inside a makeshift tarp shelter

entered.detail: concrete barriers with red and white stripes separating sidewalk from street
makeshift shelter constructed from blue tarpaulin and wooden poles
green fabric canopy stretched over a wooden frame
small orange camping tent set up on the sidewalk
industrial corrugated metal wall of adjacent building

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk bordered by concrete barriers, passing makeshift homeless shelters constructed from tarps and tents. The area is dimly lit with ambient city light and the distant glow of neon signs becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with massive neon Ferris wheel

events.description: emerging from narrow sidewalk into open plaza dominated by large neon structure
camera tilts upward to look at the massive spinning neon Ferris wheel overhead

agents.ego_description: approaching the neon structure and looking up at its rotating illuminated frame

notable_agents.action: person wearing a hat standing by the concrete barrier drinking from a cup

entered.detail: massive circular Ferris wheel structure with bright pink neon lights spinning slowly
large illuminated advertising screen showing commercial content

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a massive spinning Ferris wheel illuminated with vibrant pink neon lights. The camera approaches the structure, tilting upward to take in its scale, while passing a lone figure standing by the barrier. Digital billboards glow in the background.

events.description: passing the Ferris wheel and continuing down the city street with buildings on both sides
car with headlights on drives past on the wet road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking down the sidewalk away from the neon structure toward distant commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: woman in light-colored top walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building with multiple large illuminated advertisement screens
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the wet city street, the neon Ferris wheel recedes into the background. The camera passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction while a car drives past on the rain-slicked road. A tall digital billboard tower and palm trees become prominent features ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic urban alleyway into a sprawling, neon-drenched city plaza. It begins by moving along a narrow sidewalk bordered by concrete barriers and makeshift shelters of tarps and tents, guided by the distant glow of city lights. As the path opens up, the camera enters a wide plaza dominated by a massive, spinning Ferris wheel illuminated in vibrant pink, tilting upward to capture its scale while passing a lone figure. The scene then shifts back toward the rain-slicked street as the Ferris wheel recedes, moving past oncoming pedestrians and a passing car. Finally, the camera advances further into the district, where the environment is defined by a towering digital billboard and silhouettes of palm trees against the night sky.
